# 523a.org

> Free guide to nondischargeable debts under 11 U.S.C. Section 523(a).

523a.org is a free, open-source educational resource about which debts survive bankruptcy. Part of the Bankruptcy Transparency Network.

## Pages

- https://523a.org/: Complete guide to nondischargeable debts -- which debts survive Chapter 7 and Chapter 13
- https://523a.org/student-loans.html: Student loans in bankruptcy -- the Brunner test, undue hardship, and recent changes

## Contact

This site is maintained by volunteers. No legal advice is provided.
